chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1359 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge For Direction For N.P of CMA No.5292/2023 23-11-2023 Mr. Nisar Ali Rajput, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG has submitted compliance report and states that issue of petitioners has been resolved. Petitioners’ counsel who has received copy of the compliance report is satisfied and seeks disposal of the application, which is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
